Grantham Museum Office & Event Space To Let

To Let & Available For Hire

Office & Event Space

at Grantham Museum

Secure, character offices and a striking heritage event space, in Grantham’s landmark 1926 former Carnegie Library, overlooking St Peters Hill.

The View

Several rooms look directly out over St Peters Hill, Grantham’s civic green, including a clear view of the Isaac Newton statue. A genuine outlook, not a car park view.

Office Space To Let

Three secure offices within Grantham Museum, suited to small businesses, consultants, charities and community organisations. All rents are fully inclusive, with no separate bills to manage.

The Compton Suite

A striking heritage event space for corporate gatherings, presentations, product launches and receptions, home to Grantham’s famous Compton Organ.

The Compton Suite, Grantham Museum

71 sqm767 sq ft
50Seated capacity
100Standing reception
2Connected rooms

Dimensions

  • Main hall: 6.2m x 9.2m
  • Adjoining area: 2.3m x 6.2m
  • Total: approximately 71.3 sqm (767 sq ft)

The Compton Organ, the room’s centrepiece

Hire Options

Dry Hire

The room only. Bring your own caterer and stage your own event.

Half day (up to 4 hours)£150
Full day (up to 8 hours)£250
Evening (4 hours)£200

Includes kitchen prep area. Tables and chairs available. Caterers must hold public liability insurance.

In House Catering

Canapé & Champagne Reception

Fully staffed standing reception package.

Canapé & Prosecco, per head£28 to £32
Canapé & Champagne, per head£38 to £45
Minimum guests30

Includes room hire, waiting staff, glassware and basic AV. Final pricing confirmed on enquiry.

Live Music From The Compton Organ

Once fully restored, Grantham’s famous Compton Organ will be available to provide live background music during your event, for an additional charge. A genuinely unique addition no other Grantham venue can offer. Ask our team for current availability.

Facilities

🍽️Kitchen preparation sink and counter
🫕Heritage parquet flooring throughout
🫠Original sash windows overlooking St Peters Hill

The Setting

Grantham Museum stands on St Peters Hill, the town’s civic green, opposite the Guildhall clock tower and within a short walk of the Market Place, station and main shopping streets.

St Peters Hill, looking towards the Guildhall and the Museum (right of picture)

Arrange a Viewing

Offices and event space available now. Contact the museum team to view, check availability or request a bespoke quote.

Grantham Museum, St Peters Hill, Grantham, NG31 6PY

info@granthammuseum.org.uk

Parking: Welham Street multi storey car park is a short walk away, directly behind St Peters Hill.
